            intro i
            exact h₁ i
          exact h₂

          intro i
          exact h₁ i
        _ = (⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + ⨆ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P := by
          -- Since the right-hand side does not depend on i, the supremum is the same value
          have h₂ : ∀ i, (⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + ⨆ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P = (⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + ⨆ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P := by

            _ = (⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + ⨆ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P := by
              -- Use the fact that the function is constant with respect to i
              have h₃ : ∃ (c : ℝ≥0∞), ∀ i, (⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + ⨆ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P = c := by
                refine' ⟨(⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + ⨆ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P, _⟩
                intro i
                <;> simp
              rcases h₃ with ⟨c, hc⟩
              have h₄ : ⨆ i, ((⨆ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + ⨆ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P) = c := by
                calc

          AestronglyMeasurable.add h₂ h₃
        have h₅ : eLpNorm (fun ω ↦ X i ω + Y i ω) 2 P ≤ eLpNorm (X i) 2 P + eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P :=
          eLpNorm_add_le h₂ h₃
